name: Manufact
description: Builds, tests, and deploys MCP servers and apps to ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini. Full-stack framework on the mcp-use SDK (TS/Python) plus cloud hosting with GitHub-based deploys.

skills.name: MCP App Builder
skills.description: Scaffolds MCP servers and apps in TypeScript or Python with the opinionated, spec-compliant mcp-use SDK.

skills.name: One-Click Deploy
skills.description: Deploys MCP apps to Manufact Cloud from a GitHub repo with automated builds and inspector-based testing.

skills.name: Cross-Client Publishing
skills.description: Publishes a single MCP app to ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini so it runs across all major agent clients.
